checks.description: Guard against assuming fixed latency for edge detection; require observable output stability after any edge pattern.
checks.pass_condition: Data_out must not assert unless a complete 0‑1‑0 pulse pattern has been observed; no assumptions on exact cycle latency are made.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge case stimulus is applied.

checks.description: Require that after applying the minimal pulse pattern, data_out eventually asserts high for one cycle and then returns low.
checks.pass_condition: Data_out transitions to 1 at some clock edge after the third input cycle and returns to 0 thereafter, without requiring a specific cycle count.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic case stimulus is applied.
